action.reasoning: Observation: The predict.py failed because test.pt doesn't exist at /data/test.pt during local testing. The actual error in iter 9 was a model loading issue. The checkpoint from iter 8 (final_best.pt) has state dict keys starting with 'stem.0.weight' (direct timm model). The predict.py now handles this correctly. The error in iter 11 was just that /data/test.pt doesn't exist locally - this is expected since test data is hidden. I need to submit eval with the correct checkpoint. The best checkpoint is checkpoints/final_best.pt from iter 8 which uses direct timm ConvNeXt model. The predict.py should now handle it correctly. Let me submit eval immediately.
